name: Shenzhen Kedali Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Kedali Industry Co., Ltd. produces and sells structural components of new energy, automobiles, and solar/electrical powered automobile batteries. The company offers IT lithium battery parts, power battery components, and structural battery parts. It serves manufacturers of lithium-ion batteries and power battery cells. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
